summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GPGT e-commerce platform. Backend APIs working perfectly (100% success rate) but frontend has critical login integration issues and product display problems.

ui_bugs.issue: Products not displaying in grid despite API returning 8 products

integration_issues.issue: Login form not successfully authenticating with backend despite correct credentials
Cannot access admin dashboard due to login authentication failure
Some checkout form fields missing (name, phone, address inputs not found with data-testid)

passed_tests: Frontend homepage loading with hero section
Frontend categories display with product counts
Frontend add to cart button functionality
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical frontend-backend integration issues: 1) Login authentication not working despite backend API working correctly - check frontend login form submission and token handling. 2) Products not displaying in grid despite API returning data - check product rendering logic. 3) Add missing data-testid attributes to checkout form fields.
